instructions: Use C# 12+, Blazor, strong typing, no placeholder code.
Build a modular Product -> Environment -> Section -> FeatureKey system.
Prefer Minimal APIs in ApiService/Endpoints/ and request models in ApiService/Models/.
Do not expose DTOs with Access Keys in write operations.
Access keys are auto-generated and rotatable: Primary → Secondary + new Primary.
Wire DI with AddFeatureFlagData() and config keys FeatureFlag_RepositoryType/CacheType/etc.
Provider handles business logic, cache, key rotation, and validation.
Use validation strategy per type with Validate(object? value, string? validationRegex = null).
LargeString and StringCollection use ValidationRegex; other types ignore it.
FeatureKey contains ValidationRegex and is stored through repository/provider flow.
Repository AddAsync signatures require parent IDs; provider resolves them before create.
Phases 1-4 complete; next is Phase 5: external source fetching.
